title: malva mexicana
intro: Malva mexicana, also known as Mexican hibiscus or hibisco, is a plant native to the Americas, belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Malva mexicana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Malva mexicana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
